testcase.name: test_intake_creates_asset_with_id_and_history

failure.message: AssertionError: Wrong ID format: TSRID-TAB-i7-0002 assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfaa39629add0>('TSRID-TAB-TSRi7-') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfaa39629add0> = 'TSRID-TAB-i7-0002'.startswith

testcase.failure: tests/test_id_system.py:104: in test_intake_creates_asset_with_id_and_history assert warehouse_id.startswith("TSRID-TAB-TSRi7-"), f"Wrong ID format: {warehouse_id}" E AssertionError: Wrong ID format: TSRID-TAB-i7-0002 E assert False E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfaa39629add0>('TSRID-TAB-TSRi7-') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfaa39629add0> = 'TSRID-TAB-i7-0002'.startswith
